title: Citrusy Light Italian Rice Stir-Fry
description: A light and refreshing Roman dish featuring seasoned rice vinegar as a key ingredient to create a zesty citrus flavor that pairs well with tenderized rice.

ingredients.name: Seasoned Rice Vinegar
ingredients.notes: use 5% rice vinegar and sugar to taste

instructions: Rinse the rice thoroughly in cold water until the water runs clear. Soak it for at least 30 minutes to remove excess starch.
Cook the rice as per package instructions, ensuring that it is fluffy and well-cooked but not overcooked.
While the rice cooks, prepare the chicken by slicing it into thin strips. Season with salt and pepper.
In a pan or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until fragrant and translucent.
Add chicken pieces to the pan. Cook for about 5 minutes on each side until golden brown. Remove from the pan and set aside.
Return the pan to the stove with another tablespoon of oil if needed, then add chili pepper slices. Sauté until slightly softened.
Stir in the rice into the pan along with the seasoned rice vinegar, salt, and pepper. Mix well until evenly coated with the liquid mixture.
Once everything is combined, return the chicken to the pan. Stir gently to combine all ingredients and ensure everything is heated through.
